story.info: Woof! I'm Goodboi. Part of my daily patrol isn't connecting today. A few of my usual routes are blocked. Let's fix that!
story.headline: Goodboi on Patrol
story.summary: Sniff… something's off. A few paths in my loop aren't lining up. Let's get this place back in order.

clues.text: There we go. I always start around the busiest stretch. Good to have that path open again.
Nice. This part's quieter. I like taking it slow through here.
Sniff-sniff… this corner matters. Lots of familiar faces pass through.
Alright. This one's a little tucked away. Easy to miss if the roads don't connect.
Good. Open space again. Feels better when I can move freely.
That's better. This stretch always comes after the long bend.
All set! Every path's connected, and all is right in the world!
